title: NATS workqueue consumer uniqueness collision (err_code=10100) + MaxDeliver=3 dead-message path does not exhaust

policySnapshot.rationale: 2026-04-29 integration validation reproduced the same BUG-022-001 NATS failures after historical closure. This ownership repair reopens the existing packet, restores missing bug-owned artifacts, and routes implementation without creating a duplicate packet.

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Per-test non-overlapping FilterSubject for ARTIFACTS/DOMAIN workqueue tests; per-test FilterSubject + DeliverNewPolicy for chaos MaxDeliver test; workqueue consumers switched to DeliverAllPolicy. All three target tests pass on live integration stack with zero collateral regressions.

Re-ran ./smackerel.sh test integration on a clean test stack: TestNATS_PublishSubscribe_Artifacts PASS (0.01s), TestNATS_PublishSubscribe_Domain PASS (0.02s), TestNATS_Chaos_MaxDeliverExhaustion PASS (5.02s) with assertion 'MaxDeliver=3 exhausted after 3 Naks, no further redelivery confirmed'. Both Go integration packages green: tests/integration 19.898s, tests/integration/agent 3.100s. artifact-lint.sh exit 0. No production code changes.

Test phase executed inline by bubbles.validate during certification (bugfix-fastlane). The three target tests (TestNATS_PublishSubscribe_Artifacts, TestNATS_PublishSubscribe_Domain, TestNATS_Chaos_MaxDeliverExhaustion) plus the full Go integration suite were re-run on a clean stack. All target tests PASS. See report.md Validation Evidence.

Current test phase ownership recorded by bubbles.test for reopened BUG-022-001. Live integration target tests PASS, broad E2E produced 34/34 shell script passes plus go-e2e PASS, targeted mapped Go E2E command exited 0, and bugfix regression-quality guard exited 0 with adversarial signal detected. No NATS mocks or target skip markers were introduced.

Current regression phase verified BUG-022-001 has no in-scope regression: Go unit exited 0, Python unit exited 0 with 352 passed, full integration exited 0 with target and adjacent NATS tests PASS, broad E2E exited 0 with 34/34 shell E2E passes plus go-e2e PASS, stress exited 0, repo check exited 0, and regression-quality guard exited 0 with adversarial signal detected. Artifact lint and traceability guard pass after recording. State-transition guard now recognizes implement/test/regression but still blocks on later workflow phases. Cross-spec scan found no route, table, API, stream-contract, or design conflicts. Numeric coverage is not claimed because the repo CLI exposes no coverage command.

Reviewed the BUG-022-001 NATS integration fix across code reuse, code quality, and efficiency. No runtime source simplification was applied: the small ARTIFACTS/DOMAIN duplication is intentionally scenario-specific, and the MaxDeliver exact-zero flow remains explicit to preserve real NATS semantics. Live integration exited 0 with target NATS tests PASS; regression-quality guard exited 0 with adversarial signal detected. Post-recording artifact lint and traceability guard exited 0; state-transition guard exited 1 but recognizes simplify and blocks on later phases outside simplify ownership.

Stabilize phase completed for BUG-022-001. Verified disposable test-stack lifecycle through repo CLI up/status/down --volumes; full live integration exited 0 with ARTIFACTS, DOMAIN, replay, MaxDeliver, and unmapped-subject NATS tests PASS; clean status showed no project containers after cleanup; repo check exited 0 with SST/env-file drift guard OK; stress smoke exited 0 with 25/25 health requests and 1100-artifact search average 2077ms below the 3000ms threshold. No code, tests, Docker, generated config, or certification-owned fields were changed.

Security phase completed for BUG-022-001. Reviewed the NATS integration repair for subject naming/wildcard injection, overbroad consumers, retained DEADLETTER exposure, credential leakage, unsafe config changes, and test semantics leaking into production. No in-scope security findings were found. Repo check exited 0, implementation reality scan exited 0 with 0 violations and 1 warning, and source review found the bug-owned change confined to integration-test child subjects and exact MaxDeliver deadletter filtering. No source, Docker, generated config, dependency, or certification-owned fields were changed by this security phase.

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Validate phase completed diagnostic checks for reopened BUG-022-001 after security. Artifact lint exited 0, traceability guard exited 0 with all 3 scenarios mapped, and state-transition guard recognized implement/test/regression/simplify/stabilize/security while blocking only on validate and audit before this phase record was written. The bug remains in_progress and audit remains required before done-mode promotion.

Audit phase executed inline by bubbles.validate during certification. Verified change-boundary respect (only tests/integration/nats_stream_test.go modified), test substance (per-test FilterSubject, preserved extraReceived != 0 assertion), no silent bailouts, adversarial regression robustness, and zero production-code mutation by validate. See report.md Audit Evidence.

Current audit phase completed independent verification for reopened BUG-022-001. Artifact lint and traceability guard exited 0; implementation reality scan exited 0 with 0 violations and 1 warning; regression-quality guard exited 0 with adversarial signal detected; target skip/mock/status-only scans had no matches; Go unit exited 0; full integration exited 0 with ARTIFACTS, DOMAIN, and MaxDeliver target tests PASS. Pre-recording state-transition guard exited 1 only because current audit was not yet recorded, with legacy warnings about Test Plan path detection and historical evidence output signals. Audit did not modify source code or validation-owned certification fields and routes final certification/promotion to bubbles.validate.
validationCommands: grep -rn 't\.Skip\|\.skip(\|xit(\|xdescribe(\|\.only(\|test\.todo\|it\.todo\|pending(' tests/integration/nats_stream_test.go; status=$?; echo SKIP_SCAN_EXIT=$status; true
grep -rn 'page\.route(\|context\.route(\|msw\|nock\|intercept\|jest\.fn\|sinon\.stub\|mock(' tests/integration/nats_stream_test.go; status=$?; echo MOCK_SCAN_EXIT=$status; true
grep -rn 'expect(.*status.*)\.toBe(200)\|toBe(201)\|toBe(204)' tests/integration/nats_stream_test.go; status=$?; echo STATUS_ONLY_SCAN_EXIT=$status; true

errorSignatures: nats: API error: code=400 err_code=10100 description=filtered consumer not unique on workqueue stream
expected 0 messages after MaxDeliver exhaustion, got 1 — dead-message path broken
symptom.reproducedOn: 2026-04-29 workspace state via repo-standard integration command

impact: Blocks integration test certification across the codebase. Every spec that depends on `./smackerel.sh test integration` for certification has to defer integration DoD items while this bug is open.
